rawContent:
Tweet by @trq212 (Thariq)
Author bio: Claude Code @anthropicai.   prev YC W20, mit media lab. 

towards machines of loving grace
Text: my favorite way to use Claude Code to build large features is spec based

start with a minimal spec or prompt and ask Claude to interview you using the AskUserQuestionTool

then make a new session to execute the spec https://t.co/Lwejskje4a
